name: dealmate
description: DealMate — a full-stack second-hand marketplace with AI-powered recommendations and sentiment analysis

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend" "python ai_service/sentiment.py" "python ai_service/recommend.py"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && pip install -r ai_service/requirements.txt
